note: Seed data for the releases view. Recording releases is a separate task; this lets the list render meaningfully in review. See releases-page.js.

decisions.title: Adopt a durable job queue
decisions.context: Background work was lost on deploys; move to an at-least-once durable queue.

decisions.title: Cache the read path
decisions.context: Read latency spikes under load; add a short-TTL cache in front of the store.
decisions.alternatives: Query tuning alone and precomputed read models.

decisions.title: Introduce feature flags
decisions.context: Decouple deploy from release so risky changes ship dark first.
decisions.alternatives: Long-lived release branches and configuration-only switches.

decisions.title: Rotate to short-lived tokens
decisions.context: Long-lived credentials are hard to revoke; move to short-lived, refreshable tokens.
decisions.alternatives: Manual key rotation and narrower long-lived credentials.

decisions.title: Standardize structured logging
decisions.context: Free-text logs are hard to query; adopt a structured, queryable log format.
decisions.alternatives: Parsing free-text at ingestion and service-specific schemas.

decisions.title: Sunset the legacy CSV export
decisions.context: The CSV export is unmaintained and superseded by the JSON export.
decisions.alternatives: Repairing CSV compatibility and maintaining both formats.

releases.notes: Cleanup release. One linked decision has since been archived.
Infrastructure-only release with no decision records.
